milestoneTitle: Phase M9.4a — Learn flatten: ripped Courses|Quizzes + Academy|Tutorials toggles, replaced with a single filter-chip row (All·Lessons·Courses·Pinned·Has quiz) + sort select (Recent·A–Z·Progress) stacked above three .learn-zone glass panels: Up Next (pinned + in-progress, max 3 with overflow hint), Everything else (unified lessons + Academy + future quiz-only stubs), and Done (collapsed <details>). Added buildLearnItems / applyLearnFilter / sortLearnItems / renderLearn pure functions; retired loadAcademyHub (expand-to-snippets dropped per user confirmation — snippets still live on Tools / Claude hub), renderLessonsInto, renderTutorialsList, renderQuizzesList. Single item row idiom: .learn-item.panel-tile with kind pill + title + state badge + meta + summary. Pin state reads clhub.v1.saves under lesson:/academy: keys; write side ships in M9.6b. Legacy .lesson-row / .academy-* / .lessons-track CSS preserved (dead but kept; cleanup after v0.7.0 stabilizes). Academy courses pill reads Course; lessons pill reads Lesson; Quiz pill reserved for future body-less draft stubs.
